MV BRAVE SWALLOW (40K/24) - OPEN YOSU 7 - 10 DEC IAGW
- SHORT PERIOD UPTO 11 MONS

CH AND NO.5 CH

HYDRAULIC DECK CRANE

MAIN ENGINE TYPE/MODEL: 5S50ME-C9.7-HPSCR TIER $B-7(B
MAIN ENGINE MANUFACTURER: STX
BWTS : SUNRUI MARINE ENVIRONMENT  ENGINEERING CO.,LTD (MODEL:BC-1500)

THE SPEED AND CONSUMPTION FIGURES FOR M/E AND G/E ARE AS FOLLOWS:

AT SEA: (B) ABT 13.5 K ON ABT 20.0 MT IFO AND ABT 0.2 MT MGO
(L) ABT 13.0 K ON ABT 20.0 MT IFO AND ABT 0.2 MT MGO

IN PORT (IDLE):  ABT 3.0 MT IFO/MGO + ABT 0.2 MT MGO
(WORKING): ABT 6.0 MT IFO/MGO + ABT 0.2 MT MGO

ECO SPEED AND CONSUMPTION IN 50% LOAD IS AS FOLLOWS (FOR REFERENCE ONLY,
WITHOUT GUARANTEE)

AT SEA: (B) ABT 12.1 K ON ABT 14.0 MT IFO AND ABT 0.2 MT MGO
(L) ABT 11.4 K ON ABT 14.0 MT IFO AND ABT 0.2 MT MGO

A GOOD WEATHER DAY IS TO BE CALCULATED BASIS NOON TO NOON AND
SPEED/CONSUMPTION VALUES WITH FOLLOWING CONDITIONS ONLY;

ABOVE SPEED / CONSUMPTION ARE GIVEN BASIS GOOD WEATHER CONDITION FOR 24
CONSECUTIVE HOURS, WINDS UP TO BEAUFORT 4 / TOTAL COMBINED (SEA AND SWELL)
SIGNIFICANT WAVE HEIGHT CONFINED TO LIMITS OF DOUGLAS SEA STATE 3 (0.5-1.25
METER) IN TEMPERATE WATERS AND NOT AGAINST ADVERSE CURRENTS, TIDAL STREAMS,
AND / OR NO NEGATIVE INFLUENCE OF SWELL. ANY STEAMING DAYS WITH NET ADVERSE
CURRENTS ARE NOT TO BE INCLUDED IN THE GOOD WEATHER ANALYSIS FOR CALCULATION
OF A GOOD WEATHER PERFORMANCE SPEED. POSITIVE CURRENT SHALL NOT BE USED IN
DIMINISHING VESSEL'S PERFORMANCE AND ALWAYS EXCLUDING ANY TIME DURING WHICH
(I) REDUCTION OF SPEED IS NECESSARY FOR SAFETY DUE TO NAVIGATION IN CNGESTED
WATERS OR POOR VISIBILITY; (II) ANY PERIODS WHEN VESSEL IS
BALLASTING/DEBALLASTING OR DURING CLEANING OF CARGO HOLDS; (III) WHEN VESSEL
IS MANOEUVRING WITHIN HARBOUR, INLAND WATERS, CHANNELS, WHERE SLOW SPEED IS
REQUIRED DUE TO NATIONAL/INTERNATIONAL AND LOCAL REGULATIONS AND ALL TIMES
WHEN PILOT IS ON BOARD; (IV) WHEN VESSEL IS FOLLOWING/PROCEEDING IN CONVOY,
USING ESCORTS, OR FOLLOWING INSTRUCTIONS OF UNDERWRITERS, GOVERNMENT OF
NATION UNDER WHOSE FLAG THE VESSEL SAILS, SECURITY COUNCIL OF THE UNITED
NATIONS OR OTHER SUPERNATIONAL BODY WHEN NAVIGATING IN PIRATE INFESTED
AREAS.

ANY GAIN ON TIME AND/OR CONSUMPTION TO BE OFF-SET AGAINST LOSS ON TIME
AND/OR CONSUMPTION IF ANY AND CHARTERERS$B!G(B DEDUCTION FROM HIRE IS SUBJECT TO
OWNERS$B!G(B PRIOR APPROVAL.

ABOUT TO MEAN AS -0.5 KNOT DOWNWARDS ON THE SPEED AND +5% UPWARDS ON THE
TOTAL CONSUMPTION.

EXTRAPOLATION OF GOOD WEATHER PERFORMANCE FOR BAD WEATHER PERIOD IS NOT
ALLOWED.

THE ABOVE FIGURES ARE EXCLUDE OCCASIONS OF BALLAST EXCHANGE, NOX TIER III
MODE AND BOILER USAGE.

OWNERS ONLY AGREE WITH THE VESSEL'S SLOW STEAMING LESS THAN NCR WITHOUT
ENTERING THE LEVEL OF AUX. BLOWER CONTINUOUS AUTO START/STOP SUBJECT TO
FOLLOWING CONDITIONS.

SLOW STEAMING CONDITIONS FROM NCR TO MIN 50% OF MCR:

1) M/E LOAD (%) SHOULD BE ALWAYS MAINTAINED OVER 50 % ALWAYS (I.E. NOT LESS
THAN THE RANGE OF 49 %) OF MCR OUTPUT IN SAFE OPERABLE CONDITION AND
HARMLESS TO THE ENGINE AND WITHIN A REASONABLE STEAMING TIME WHICH SHOULD
NOT RESULT IN BAD PERFORMANCE AFTER SUCH SLOW STEAMING.

2) IN EVERY DAY DURING SUCH LOW STEAMING, THE SHIP HAS AN OPTION TO INCREASE
THE MCR OUTPUT BETWEEN 75 % AND 85 % FOR ABOUT ONE HOUR BUILDING UP THE
SPEED TO SUCH LEVEL AND ABOUT 4 HOURS TO KEEP BETWEEN 75 % AND 85 % THEN
ABOUT ONE HOUR TO REDUCE SPEED / MCR AGAIN.

3) FRESH WATER TO BE FOR C/A IF ANY. IF VESSEL CONTINUES TO RUN AT LOW LOAD,
THE PRODUCTION OF FRESH WATER WILL BE MUCH AFFECTED AT ONE POINT IN TIME.,
I.E. THE VESSEL
WILL HAVE TO TAKE FRESH WATER.

  IN CASE THE VESSEL WILL NOT BE ABLE TO PRODUCE SUFFICIENT FRESH WATER
DURING THE M/E OPERATION AT LOW LOAD DUE TO REDUCED SPEED AS PER CHARTERER'S
INSTRUCTION AND/OR HAVE TO TAKE FRESH WATER (IF ANY), THE REPLENISHMENT OF
FRESH WATER TO VESSEL SHALL BE FULLY BORNE BY CHARTERER AND OWNERS SHALL NOT
BE RESPONSIBLE FOR ANY COST INVOLVING THE SUPPLY OF FRESH WATER.

4) IF ANY CASE WHICH ABNORMAL/STRANGE/SUSPICIOUS MATTER IS OCCURRED OR FOUND
OUT AGAINST THE CHARTERER'S SLOW STEAMING, THE M/E LOAD WILL BE RETURNED UP
TO NORMAL IMMEDIATELY.

IN CASE CHRTRS INSTRUCT ANY REDUCED SPEED/CONSUMPTION OR PROLONGED PORT STAY
MORE THAN 21 DAYS, CHRTRS TO WAIVE THEIR RIGHT TO CLAIM UNDER-PERFORMANCE
(SPEED CLAIM AND/OR OVER CONSUMPTION CLAIM) THROUGHOUT THE CHARTER PERIOD.

THE VESSEL ENTITLES TO USE ADDITIONAL LOW SULPHUR GAS OIL / FUEL OIL FOR
MAIN ENGINE / AUXILIARIES IN CASE OF EMERGENCY OR WHILE MANEUVERING IN
NARROW / SHALLOW WATERS, CANALS, RIVERS, ENTERING/LEAVING PORTS/CANALS,
STARTING/STOPPING THE ENGINE, BALLAST WATER EXCHANGING, INCINERATOR,
CLEANING VESSEL'S HOLDS, BALLASTING/DE-BALLASTING OPERATION, AT LOW LOAD, FW
PRODUCTION DUE TO SHORT OF FW IN CASE OF PROLONGED STAY, AND DURING POOR
VISIBILITY/HEAVY WEATHER/WINTER SEASON, ALSO DURING MAINTENANCE WORK ALWAYS
AT THE DIRECTION OF MASTER.


ANY EXTRA COSTS AND TIME (WHICH INCLUDE BUT NOT LIMITED TO ANY
TRANSPORTATION COSTS OF SUPPLY BOAT AND SHIFTING & BIRTHING COSTS OF THE
VESSEL) TO SUPPLY ANY PROVISION AND/OR FRESH WATER TO THE VESSEL DUE TO
PROLONGED STAY OF THE VESSEL AT PORT, ANCHORAGE OR ANYWHERE IN ACCORDANCE
WITH THE CHARTERERS' ORDER SHALL BE FOR THE ACCOUNT OF THE CHARTERERS.

FOR THE AVOIDANCE OF ANY DOUBT, IF (I) THE VESSEL IS ORDERED BY THE
CHARTERERS TO STAY AT PORT, ANCHORAGE OR ANYWHERE (II) THE VESSEL CANNOT
MAKE SUFFICIENT FRESH WATER BY THE GENERATORS OF THE VESSEL THERE DUE TO
QUALITY OF WATER OR ANY OTHER ENVIRONMENTAL OR REGULATORY REASON AND (III)
THE VESSEL NEEDS TO HAVE SUPPLY OF FRESH WATER, ANY EXTRA COSTS AND TIME
(WHICH INCLUDE BUT NOT LIMITED TO ANY TRANSPORTATION COSTS OF SUPPLY BOAT
AND SHIFTING & BIRTHING COSTS OF THE VESSEL) TO SUPPLY ANY FRESH WATER TO
THE VESSEL SHALL BE FOR THE ACCOUNT OF THE CHARTERERS.

-BUNKER GRADE:

VLSFO - ISO8217:2017 RME OR ANY SUBSEQUENT AMENDMENT THEREOF BUT ALWAYS
THE LATEST ISO 8217 TO BE APPLIED

LSMGO - ISO8217:2017 DMA OR ANY SUBSEQUENT AMENDMENT THEREOF BUT ALWAYS
THE LATEST ISO 8217 TO BE APPLIED

BIMCO BUNKER QUALITY AND LIABILITY CLAUSE 2011, BIMCO BUNKERING
OPERATIONS AND SAMPLING CLAUSE 2011, BIMCO 2020 MARINE FUEL SULPHUR
CONTENT CLAUSE FOR TIME CHARTER PARTIES, AMENDED BIMCO HULL FOULING CLAUSE
FOR TIME CHARTER PARTIES 2019 TO BE APPLIED.

IN ALL CIRCUMSTANCES, CHARTERERS SHALL ALWAYS PROVIDE FUEL THAT IS SAFE,
STABLE, FREE FROM ANY MATERIAL THAT MAY RENDER THE FUEL UNACCEPTABLE FOR USE
BY THE VESSEL, COMPATIBLE WITH ANY PREVIOUSLY SUPPLIED BUNKER ON BOARD AND
SUITABLE FOR THE VESSEL TO BURN AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH THE LATEST VERSION OF
ISO 8217, AND/OR ANY OTHER RELEVANT FUEL SPECIFICATIONS, AND AS REQUIRED BY
MARPOL ANNEX VI (AS AMENDED FROM TIME TO TIME) AND/OR AS REQUIRED BY ANY
OTHER APPLICABLE LAWFUL AUTHORITY. MIXING OF FUEL IS STRICTLY PROHIBITED.

CHARTERERS CONFIRM THAT ACTUAL COST OF SLUDGE DISPERSANT TO BE FOR
CHARTERERS$B!G(B ACCOUNT IN CASE OWNERS OR MASTER USE SLUDGE DISPERSANT ON BOARD
DUE TO ALLEGED QUALITY PROBLEM OF SUPPLIED BUNKER.

CHARTERERS WARRANT THAT FUELS TO BE SUPPLIED AND BARGES NOMINATED FOR BUNKER
REPLENISHMENT ARE NOT DESIGNATED IN ANY SANCTIONS LIST ISSUED BY THE UN, US
OR EU AND IS NOT OWNERS OR CONTROLLED BY ANY PERSON OR ENTITY REGISTERED IN
OR OPERATING FROM IRAN, OR DESIGNATED IN ANY SANCTIONS ISSUED BY THE UN, US
OR EU.

ALL FIGURES / DETAILS $B!H(BABOUT$B!I(B AND WITHOUT GUARANTEE
